log_entry.description: Insert one cycle log row for the current identity.
log_entry.wakeMessage: The user logged a period entry for {{input.logged_on}} with flow {{input.flow}}, mood {{input.mood}}, energy {{input.energy}}/5, symptoms {{input.symptoms}}, and notes {{input.notes}}. Reflect only if there is a short, useful follow-up, pattern, or reminder.
log_entry.sql: insert into cycle_logs (identity_id, logged_on, flow, mood, energy, symptoms_json, notes, created_at) values (:identityId, :logged_on, :flow, nullif(:mood, ''), :energy, coalesce(:symptoms, '[]'), nullif(:notes, ''), :now)

delete_entry.description: Delete one cycle log row for the current identity.
delete_entry.sql: delete from cycle_logs where id = :id and identity_id = :identityId
